comments.body:
_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_ | _⚡ Quick win_

**Validate `runnerSubagentReview` before writing runner policy.**

`patchRunPolicyWithFlags` currently accepts any string and force-casts it to a runner kind. Because this helper is exported, non-CLI callers can persist invalid `reviewSubagent.kind='runner'` values.

 

<details>
<summary>Suggested fix</summary>

```diff
-import type {
+import {
+  VALID_SUBAGENT_REVIEW_RUNNER_KINDS,
+  type SubagentReviewRunnerKind,
+} from './config';
-  ResolvedOrchestratorConfig,
-  ReviewPolicyStageValue,
-  SubagentReviewRunnerKind,
-  TicketBoundaryMode,
-} from './config';
+import type {
+  ResolvedOrchestratorConfig,
+  ReviewPolicyStageValue,
+  TicketBoundaryMode,
+} from './config';
@@
   if (reviewSubagentFlags > 1) {
@@
   }
 
+  if (
+    flags.runnerSubagentReview !== undefined &&
+    !VALID_SUBAGENT_REVIEW_RUNNER_KINDS.includes(
+      flags.runnerSubagentReview as SubagentReviewRunnerKind,
+    )
+  ) {
+    throw new Error(
+      `patchRunPolicyWithFlags: invalid runnerSubagentReview "${flags.runnerSubagentReview}". Expected: ${VALID_SUBAGENT_REVIEW_RUNNER_KINDS.join(', ')}.`,
+    );
+  }
+
   let reviewSubagent: RunPolicyReviewSubagent;
```
</details>

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the
rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate.

In `@tools/delivery/state.ts` around lines 150 - 171, patchRunPolicyWithFlags
currently force-casts flags.runnerSubagentReview into a RunPolicyReviewSubagent
with kind 'runner' without validating the value; add validation in
patchRunPolicyWithFlags to ensure flags.runnerSubagentReview is one of the
allowed SubagentReviewRunnerKind values (use an explicit whitelist or type-guard
function) before constructing reviewSubagent, and throw a clear Error if it is
invalid, so RunPolicyReviewSubagent and SubagentReviewRunnerKind are never
populated with an arbitrary string.
```

</details>

<!-- fingerprinting:phantom:poseidon:hawk -->

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: summarize by coderabbit.ai -->

<!-- review_stack_entry_end -->
<!-- walkthrough_start -->

## Walkthrough

This PR adds runner-native delivery policy support by introducing a `subagentReviewRunner` configuration field and corresponding `--runner-subagent-review` CLI flag. The implementation defines new `SubagentReviewRunnerKind` types, extends configuration parsing to validate runner kinds, threads the CLI flag through argument parsing with mutual exclusivity checks, implements precedence logic in runtime override resolution, updates run policy state machine to map runner config to runtime policies with format rendering, and includes comprehensive test coverage across config loading, policy derivation, CLI wiring, and formatting.

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
<!-- tips_start -->
